name: mhp-connect-v2
description: mhp | connect 2.0 — Student portal for MHP Hypnose

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter '@mhp/shared' build && pnpm --filter '@mhp/integrations' build && pnpm --parallel --filter './apps/*' dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter '@mhp/shared' build && pnpm --filter '@mhp/integrations' build && pnpm --parallel --filter './apps/*' build
